settings.title: Settings
settings.noAccessDescription: Your current role does not have permissions for this module.
settings.discardMessage: You have unsaved changes in this module. Switching now will discard those edits.
settings.resetModuleMessage: This will reset {module} to default values.
settings.revertAccountMessage: This will discard unsaved account edits and restore the last saved values.
settings.toast.noPermission: You do not have permission to update this settings module.
settings.toast.fixErrors: Please fix the account form errors before saving.
settings.module.accountDescription: Manage organization profile and account information
settings.notifications.title: Notification Preferences
settings.notifications.description: Choose what your team should be notified about.
settings.security.title: Security Controls
settings.security.description: Apply baseline controls for your organization users.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.description: Tune visual preferences for your workspace.
settings.appearance.appliedImmediately: Applied immediately. Resets to dark on logout.
settings.appearance.languageDescription: Choose the language used by the administration modules.
settings.account.taxIdHelp: Optional, but if provided must be valid.
